zh.lifeSummary: 當Ludwig III von Oettingen於1200年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 堂瑙-利斯時，他的父親Graf Ludwig II von Oettingen61歲，母親Sofie von Lechsgemünd30歲。他於1241年之前與Countess Margarethe von Berg und Schelklingen結婚。他去世於1279年9月24日在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 凱拉海姆凱拉海姆史瓦本享年79歲。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Oettingen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hanni, Christoph, Siegbert.
German (also Öttinger): habitational name for someone from a place in Bavaria called Oettingen or a place in Lorraine (France) called Öttingen (French Ottange). Compare Ottinger and Ettinger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ettinger  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Ottinger
meanings: German (also Öttinger): habitational name for someone from any of the places called Otting or Öttingen, in Swabia, Bavaria, and Lorraine (France). Compare Oettinger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Ettinger  , a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Ludwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from hlud ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’; an ancient royal and imperial name. See Louis .

variants.name: Louis
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Ludwig III von Oettingen was born in 1200, in Donau-Ries, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Graf Ludwig II von Oettingen, was 61 and his mother, Sofie von Lechsgemünd, was 30. He married Countess Margarethe von Berg und Schelklingen before 1241. He died on 24 September 1279, in Schwaben, Kelheim, Kelheim, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ludwig III von Oettingen est né en 1200, à Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Graf Ludwig II von Oettingen, avait 61 ans et sa mère, Sofie von Lechsgemünd, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Countess Margarethe von Berg und Schelklingen avant 1241. Il est décédé le 24 septembre 1279, à Schwaben, Kelheim, Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 79 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ludwig III von Oettingen 1200 in Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Ludwig II von Oettingen 61 und seine Mutter Sofie von Lechsgemünd 30. Er hat vor 1241 Countess Margarethe von Berg und Schelklingen geheiratet. Er starb am 24. September 1279 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Schwaben, Kelheim, Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ludwig III von Oettingen è nato il nel 1200 nel Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Ludwig II von Oettingen, aveva 61 anni e il suo madre, Sofie von Lechsgemünd, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Countess Margarethe von Berg und Schelklingen prima del 1241. Morì il 24 settembre 1279, nel Schwaben, Kelheim, Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Ludwig III von Oettingen(이)가 1200년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 도나-리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Ludwig II von Oettingen(은)는 61세였고, 그의 어머니 Sofie von Lechsgemünd(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1241년 이전 Countess Margarethe von Berg und Schelklingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1279년 9월 24일 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 켈하임 켈하임 슈와벤에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.Schwaben, Kelheim, Bayern, Germany: щвабен, келхим, ландкрис келхим, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ludwig III von Oettingen родился в 1200 г. в местности ландкрис донау-риесь, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Ludwig II von Oettingen было 61 год, а матери, которую звали Sofie von Lechsgemünd, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Countess Margarethe von Berg und Schelklingen перед 1241 г. Он умер 24 сентября 1279 г. в местности щвабен, келхим, ландкрис келхим, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 79 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ludwig III von Oettingen nació en 1200, en Landkreis Donau-Ries, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Graf Ludwig II von Oettingen, tenía 61 años y su mamá, Sofie von Lechsgemünd, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Countess Margarethe von Berg und Schelklingen antes de 1241. Murió el 24 de septiembre de 1279, en Schwaben, Kelheim, Landkreis Kelheim, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 79 años.
